description: These Plain Baby super soft cotton-rich tights are cold weather essentials for your little one. Made from a cosy poly-cotton blend, they provide warmth and comfort while allowing freedom of movement thanks to the stretchy elastane. These tights are skin-friendly and available in a wide range of sizes from newborn to 24 months, ensuring a perfect fit as your baby grows. Their soft and snug feel makes them ideal for layering under dresses, rompers, or trousers on chilly days. With their versatile design, these tights are a must-have in every baby's winter wardrobe.
